test-method.name: verifyUserLoginWithValidCredentials
test-method.description: Validating user login with valid credentials

test-method.name: verifyUserLoginWithInvalidUserName
test-method.description: Validating user login with invalid username

test-method.name: verifyUserLoginWithInvalidPassword
test-method.description: Validating user login with invalid password

test-method.name: verifyUserLoginWithInvalidCredentials
test-method.description: Validating user login with invalid credentials
